notes: All thresholds are TARGET-AGNOSTIC. They reference top-N ranking properties or aggregate statistics, never a specific gene identifier. GDF15-specific verification lives in evaluator/expected_thresholds.json.

loo_ablation.criterion_description: Average absolute rank-change in top 5 across all single-dim removals

negative_controls.criterion_description: Each NC must rank below median (percentile >= 50)

literature_blinded.criterion_description: Top-5 candidates after literature-dimension ablation should retain >=3 of original top-5

cross_biobank_mr.criterion_description: MR estimates sign-consistent across at least 2 of 3 biobanks for top candidate's primary phenotype

permutation_test.criterion_description: Empirical p-value of top-ranked candidate's composite score under permuted dim assignments
